docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REEDY, ALEX

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARROLL, ROBERTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REEDY, ALEX NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL, ROBERTA. PROOF OF SERICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO ROBERTA CARROLL RETURNED--MOVED, NOT FORWARDABLE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY CARROLL, ROBERTA AS TO DEFENDANT REEDY, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
